title: Ehud Barak on Office Hours
summary: Former Prime Minister of Israel Ehud Barak (@barak_ehud), the most decorated soldier in Israel’s history and a non-resident Senior Fellow at the Belfer Center, talks with Aroop Mukharji (@aroopmukharji) about who needs to defeat ISIS, how Israelis view President Trump, and his curiosity about clocks.
body: Former Prime Minister of Israel Ehud Barak (@barak_ehud), the most decorated soldier in Israel’s history and a non-resident Senior Fellow at the Belfer Center, talks with Aroop Mukharji (@aroopmukharji) about who needs to defeat ISIS, how Israelis view President Trump, and his curiosity about clocks. The latest from Belfer See more Gallery 1 of 4 Ehud Barak: Will Trump be Good for Israel? Was Obama? 2 of 4 Ehud Barak: His Curiosity about Clocks 3 of 4 Ehud Barak: ISIS Must Be Defeated by Muslims 4 of 4 Ehud Barak: A Unique Path to Public Service Ehud Barak was Israel’s 10th Prime Minister, leading the country out of prolonged recession and into an economic boom, with 5.9% annual growth, record foreign investments, near-zero inflation, a halved deficit, and substantially decreased external debt. Before being elected Prime Minister, Barak completed an illustrious 36-year career in the IDF as the most decorated soldier in its history. _list.source: Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School

result.main_content_en: Former Israeli Prime Minister Ehud Barak, a non-resident Senior Fellow at the Belfer Center, discusses key geopolitical issues in an interview. He addresses the need for Muslims to lead the fight against ISIS, analyzes Israeli perspectives on President Trump's policies compared to Obama's, and shares personal anecdotes about his curiosity. The article highlights Barak's distinguished background as Israel's most decorated soldier and his tenure as Prime Minister, during which he oversaw significant economic growth, reduced inflation and deficit, and attracted record foreign investment. The content is framed within discussions on international relations, security, and Middle East policy.
result.main_content_zh: 以色列前总理埃胡德·巴拉克，作为贝尔弗中心非常驻高级研究员，在一次访谈中讨论了关键的地缘政治问题。他阐述了需要由穆斯林领导打击ISIS的观点，分析了以色列人对特朗普总统政策与奥巴马政策的看法对比，并分享了他个人对钟表好奇心的轶事。文章强调了巴拉克作为以色列授勋最多士兵的杰出背景，以及其担任总理期间的经济成就，包括显著的经济增长、降低的通胀和赤字，以及创纪录的外国投资。内容围绕国际关系、安全和中东政策展开讨论。
